meta.title: China As The Most Active Shaper Of The Cybersecurity Space
meta.description:
Adam Segal of Council on Foreign Relations on the S4x18 Main Stage provides several key areas and examples on how China is shaping, and will shape, the future of cybersecurity around the world.

Adam covers four main areas:
1) China's motivation to dominate "cyber". What are China's concerns?
2) What is China doing today?
3) What he is uncertain about vis-a-vis China's policy?
4) What the US and other countries should do in response to China?
